title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSDL - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at NSDL are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSDL:
NSDL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
